title: Fix map edge + speech modal + voted fountain

log.context: Fix map edge + speech modal + voted fountain

All three fixes are done. Here's a summary:

**Fix 1 - Map edge transition (root cause fixed):**
The bug was in `updateLocalPlayer()` — `isBlocked()` returns `true` for out-of-bounds tile coords, so when the player walked to the edge, the collision check hit `return; // fully blocked` before the chunk transition logic could run. Fixed by moving the edge detection block entirely before the collision check, with an early return on `crossed`. Removed the now-dead duplicate `if (crossed)` block.
